arts.ttl: Roy Keane tears into Manchester United players after 'shocking' Leicester City display
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news with Roy Keane delivering a fresh verdict on his former club after their poor display against Leicester

arts.ttl: Roy Keane tears into Manchester United’s FA Cup showing against Leicester: ‘They’re boring’
arts.sum: It’s safe to say Roy Keane was not impressed with United’s first-half performance at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo reaction to Jhon Duran debut goal speaks volumes after Man United admission
arts.sum: Former Man United hero Cristiano Ronaldo seems to be enjoying playing with new strike partner Jhon Duran

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals Patrick Dorgu plan after £29.4m signing is handed his Man United debut against Leicester in the FA Cup fourth round - but wing back is taken off at half-time
arts.sum: Dorgu came straight into the Manchester United starting line-up for their FA Cup fourth round tie against Leicester, after completing his £29.4million move from Lecce last week.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane slams 'shocking' and 'boring' Manchester United for first half showing against Leicester - as he jokingly points out where the goal is
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim's men failed to have a shot on target in the first half at Old Trafford, with the visitors, who are in the relegation zone in the Premier League, going into the break 1-0 up.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery lifts lid on Marcus Rashford's start to life at Aston Villa after Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford completed a move to Aston Villa on loan late in the transfer window after enduring a difficult time at Old Trafford under Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: How Man United players showed support for Lisandro Martinez with emotional three-word message
arts.sum: Manchester United players showed support for Lisandro Martinez during their warm-up on the Old Trafford pitch before their FA Cup fourth-round tie against Leicester City

arts.ttl: Man United stars pay tribute to team-mate Lisandro Martinez ahead of FA Cup tie - after the defender suffered a season-ending knee injury
arts.sum: Man United players were seen warming up for their FA Cup tie against Leicester wearing t-shirts featuring the message in Spanish 'Mucha Fuerza Licha' - meaning 'Lots of strength, Licha'.

arts.ttl: Who is Hubert Graczyk? Third Arsenal academy coup on Man United bench vs Leicester City
